StructurePhase.Reference: Svechnikov V.N., Spektor A.T., Russ. Metall. (Engl. Transl.), v4 p118-121 (1968)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1011081. Sample Preparation: Sample annealed at 1623 K for 350 h. Article Title: Phase diagram of the Zr-Mo-Nb system in the solid state (up to 1800 °C). Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factors reported/abstracted. Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
